name: Barley Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last three in a 3-quart pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until the barley is tender.
3. Mix the flour into 1/2 cup of milk and add it to the soup.
4. Add the remaining milk. Cook for about five more minutes until thickened.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the cheese. Cover and let stand for 3-5 minutes.
